info.title: Fenicio Service
info.description:
Fenicio Service

 **Last update**: 26 dic 25, 01:12 p. m.

get.summary: Get a list of base prices

200.description: The complete Fenicio Product found in an object with a property completeFenicioProduct

get.summary: Get a list of Fenicio Products with sort options and filters
Get a price sheet by ID
Get a list of the price sheets

post.summary: List Fenicio Products with custom response

200.description: Fenicio products listed. In case an error occurs, the API will also respond with status code 200 and the details of the error will be in the message.
The complete Sku found in an object with a property completeSku

get.summary: Get a list of Skus with sort options and filters

post.summary: Retrieve the Stock of a given SKU

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

AccountFilters.name: filters
AccountFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

AttributeFilters.name: filters
AttributeFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PriceFilters.name: filters
PriceFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

FenicioProductFilters.name: filters
FenicioProductFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

OrderFilters.name: filters
OrderFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

OrderStatusChangeFilters.name: filters
OrderStatusChangeFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

SkusFilters.name: filters
SkusFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

accountsIds.description: The Related Account's IDs. This refers to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

skuReferenceId.description: The Janis skus's `referenceId`. See [Sku](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

listPriceValue.description: The list price value. This price must be greater than the `price` field.

_idSolicitud.description: The unique identifier of the request

accountId.description:
The Account `id`.
This field refer to **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

dateCreatedTo.description: Matches with items that were created up to the received date

dateCreatedFrom.description: Matches with items that were created from the received date

pricingId.description:
The Pricing `id`.
This field refer to **Janis Pricing Service**. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price).

minQuantity.description:
The minimal quantity of an SKU to apply the specified price.
This field is used to generate the concept known as "price by quantity".

priceSheet.description: The ID of the price sheet. Refers to the `id` of the pricing **price-sheet** entity. See [price-sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet)

salesChannelId.description: The Sales Channel ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

salesChannelsIds.description: A list of sales channels IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

name.description: The Janis sales channel's `name`. See [Sales Channel](commerce#tag/Sales-Channel) for further information

referenceId.description: The Janis sales channel's `referenceId`. See [Sales Channel](commerce#tag/Sales-Channel) for further information

availableSalesChannels.description: The Account's available sales channels ids

variantCodeAttribute.description: The Account's variant code attribute id

warehouseStockSourceId.description: The Account's warehouse `id` associated. See [Warehouse](wms#tag/Warehouse) for further information

sequentialIdType.description: The Account's sequential identifier type to generate

group.description: The Attribute's group's ID. This refers to the `id` of the **Attribute Group** Entity. See [Attribute Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Group).

category.description:
The Category ID. This refers to the `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).
If `null` or not set it means that the attribute applies to all the products in catalog.

isRequired.description: Determines if the attribute is required

appliesToSkus.description: Determines if the attribute applies to skus or products

defaultValue.description:
The default value for the **Product** or **Sku** if no value is defined.
When `options` are defined, `defaultValue` must be one of them.

pricePricingId.description:
The Pricing `id` of the same sku price.
This field refer to **Janis Pricing Service**. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price).

accountId.description: The Janis account's `id`. See [Account](commerce#tag/Account) for further information

productId.description: The Janis product's `id`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

brandId.description: The Janis product's `brand`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

categoryId.description: The Janis product's `category`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

codigo.description: The Janis product's `referenceId`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

nombre.description: The Janis product's `name`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

monedaPredeterminada.description: The product's currency in code ISO 4217

atributos.description: The product's attributes. It can contain the Janis product's `brand`, `category`, `description`, and others. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

variantes.description: The product's variants, grouped by the value of the attribute defined as `variantCode` in the client's account settings. See [Account](fenicio#tag/Account) for further information

codigo.description: The variant's code id defined in the client's account settings. See [Account](fenicio#tag/Account) for further information

nombre.description: The value of the variant's code defined in the client's account settings. See [Account](fenicio#tag/Account) for further information

atributos.description: The Janis product's sku `attributes`. See [Sku](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

presentaciones.description: The product's variant presentations, grouped by the value of the attribute defined as `presentationAttribute` in the client's account settings. See [Account](fenicio#tag/Account) for further information

codigo.description: The Janis product's sku attribute value

sku.description: The Janis product's sku `referenceId`. See [Sku](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

nombre.description: The Janis product's sku attribute value

stock.description: The product's available stock for the warehouse defined in the client's account settings, or aggregated across all warehouses if the setting unified stock is enabled. See [Account](fenicio#tag/Account) for further information

precioLista.description: The product's original price mapped by currency in code ISO 4217

previoVenta.description: The product's selling price mapped by currency in code ISO 4217

identificadores.description: The product's sku `eans` codes. See [Sku](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

CustomResponseFenicioProduct.description: An object with the complete Fenicio Product

idOrden.description: The unique identifier of the order in Fenicio

idOrdenOrigen.description: The unique identifier of the order in the external origin

referencia.description: The unique identifier of the reference

fechaInicio.description: The start date of the order

fechaAbandono.description: The abandon date of the order

fechaRecuperada.description: The recovery date of the order

fechaFin.description: The end date of the order

fechaCancelada.description: The cancel date of the order

moneda.description: The code ISO 4217 of the currency

lineas.description: The details of all the lines of the order

impuestos.description: The taxes amount of the order

importeTotal.description: The total amount of the order

observaciones.description: The general observations of the order

accountId.description: The id of the account associated with the order

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

apellido.description: The last name of the user

pais.description: The country ISO 3166-1 code of the document

programaMillas.description: The miles program of the user

calle.description: The street name of the address

numeroPuerta.description: The street number of the address

numeroApto.description: The apartment number of the address

codigoPostal.description: The postal code of the address

id.description: The unique identifier of the payment

idExterno.description: The external unique identifier of the payment

fechaVencimiento.description: The expiration date of the payment

fechaPago.description: The confirmation date of the payment

fechaCancelacion.description: The cancelation date of the payment

cuotas.description: The number of quotas of the payment

importe.description: The amount total of the payment

moneda.description: The code ISO 4217 of the currency of the payment

bin.description: The first 6 digits of the card of the payment

autorizacion.description: The authorization code of the payment

terminacionTarjeta.description: The last 4 digits of the card of the payment

PaymentConnector.description: The type of connector used for the payment

horario.description: The time range of the shipping

desde.description: The start date of the shipping

hasta.description: The end date of the shipping

destinatario.description: The person who receives the order

id.description: The unique identifier of the shipping service

codigo.description: The code of the shipping service

nombre.description: The name of the shipping service

codigoTracking.description: The tracking code assigned by the shipping service

etiqueta.description: The file URL of the shipping label generated by the shipping service

sku.description: The unique identifier of the article

codigoPrecio.description: The code of the type of the price of the article

precio.description: The unit price of the line

descuentos.description: The list of discounts applied to the line

attributos.description: The attributes values of the article

operador.description: The details of the operator of the event

apellido.description: The last name of the operator

source.description: The source of the status change

orderId.description: The Fenicio id of the order

clientCode.description: The client code of the order

account.description: The name of the account that originated the status change

eventType.description: The event type of the status order

loggingData.description: A list of logging information of the status change process

status.description: The order status change processing status

OrderStatusChangeList.description: A list of Order Status Changes

dateFrom.description:
The date from where the price will apply.

**Important**: This value must be a ISOString. See more information in [ISO_8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

This field should be lesser than `dateTo`

dateTo.description:
The date until the price will apply.

**Important**: This value must be a ISOString. See more information in [ISO_8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

This field must be greater than `dateFrom`

incrementThreshold.description:
The increment threshold of the Price Sheet, this field is a number, but represents a percentage.
This is used for determinate if price changes requires an audit process.

decrementThreshold.description:
The decrement threshold of the Price Sheet, this field is a number, but represents a percentage.
This is used for determinate if price changes requires an audit process.

desde.description: The position of the first Fenicio Product to return from DB

total.description: The total Fenicio Products to return from DB

FenicioProductResponse.description: The response to the Producto API Request. This is the response provided to Fenicio

mensaje.description: The message of the response. If success, the value is `null`. If error, the value is the error details

data.description: The data of the response. If error, the value is `null`

desde.description: The position of the first Fenicio Product to return from DB

total.description: The total Fenicio Products to return from DB

items.description: The Janis account's `id`. See [Account](commerce#tag/Account) for further information

ean.description: The Janis sku's main `ean`. See [Sku](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

name.description: The Janis sku's `name`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Sku) for further information

product.description: The Janis product's `id`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

productReferenceId.description: The Janis product's `referenceId`. See [Product](catalog#tag/Product) for further information

attributes.description: The skus's attributes values mapped by its attribute id. See [Sku-Attributes](catalog#tag/Sku-Attribute) for further information

CustomSkuResponse.description: An object with the complete Sku content

skus.description: The IDs of the SKUs to retrieve their stock

mensaje.description: Response message with the error message in case of an error. If the response is successful message will be null
mensaje.example: An account name needs to be passed in the request headers

stockPorSku.description: A list of SKUs with their stock

sku.description: The SKU used by Fenicio. This represents de Sku referenceId in Janis

stock.description:
The stock for the required SKU.
The result can be either the aggregated stock considering all warehouses or the stock of the warehouse defined in the Account settings.
